title: hieracium praecox subsp. fallens
intro: Hieracium praecox subsp. fallens is a subspecies of the autumn hawk's-beard plant, a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe and calm skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium praecox subsp. fallens include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its possible antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hieracium praecox subsp. fallens are typically used to make infusions, tinctures, or salves that can be applied topically to affected areas.
